What Our Patients Say

Read about the experiences of our valued patients and see why they trust Surya Dental Care for their oral health needs.

"After my previous disappointing visit, I am happy to share that my last two appointments at the clinic were completely different—in the best way. Both appointments were handled with punctuality, professionalism, and genuine care. The staff were attentive, the process was smooth, and I felt well-informed throughout my visits... I now feel confident and comfortable continuing my dental care with this clinic."

- Ravi Vasudevan

"Highly recommend! I have LOTS of anxiety about going to the dentist. After this visit. Dr. Nehla and Dr. P. Senthil Kumar were courteous, friendly, and professional. They made me feel comfortable and I believe the treatment plan is actionable and has my best interest in mind. They really took the time necessary to do everything right. Great dental experience!💯"

- Usha S

"First of all, I would like to thank Dr. Senthil Sir & the entire team at Surya Dental Care... I met with an accident and lost three of my upper teeth... I was very tense about the treatment before coming, but each time I visited, they took excellent care of me. They treat every patient with so much attention and kindness. Successfully had my dental implants done here."

- Mahalakshmi

Your story could be next.
Experience our care.

Ready for a Healthier Smile?

Schedule your appointment today and experience the personalized, high-quality care that sets us apart. Our team is ready to welcome you.

Providing professional, calm, and trustworthy dental care with modern technology.
